title: Pixel's PVP Pack
description: PVP Modpack that helps you read information about your gameplay, while optimizing for FPS at the same time
body:
This pack is designed to help you during Minecraft PVP. This includes optimizations and details to help you in your matches. List of mods is dependent on the version.
This includes Pixel's Pack, a resource pack from me that is also designed for PVP that is optional.
